mapper.insert: MERGE INTO agents (agent_id, environment, hostname, version, protocols_json, agent_ip, registered_at, last_heartbeat) KEY(agent_id) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{environment}, #{hostname}, #{version}, #{protocols, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{agentIp}, #{registeredAt}, #{lastHeartbeat})

INSERT INTO agents (agent_id, environment, hostname, version, protocols_json, agent_ip, registered_at, last_heartbeat) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{environment}, #{hostname}, #{version}, #{protocols, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{agentIp}, #{registeredAt}, #{lastHeartbeat}) ON CONFLICT(agent_id) DO UPDATE SET environment = EXCLUDED.environment, hostname = EXCLUDED.hostname, version = EXCLUDED.version, protocols_json = EXCLUDED.protocols_json, agent_ip = EXCLUDED.agent_ip, registered_at = EXCLUDED.registered_at, last_heartbeat = EXCLUDED.last_heartbeat
mapper.update: UPDATE agents SET last_heartbeat = #{lastHeartbeat}, agent_ip = #{agentIp} WHERE agent_id = #{agentId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agents ORDER BY registered_at ASC
SELECT * FROM agents WHERE environment = #{environment} ORDER BY registered_at ASC
